title: 质因数分解·乘积问题
question: 三个连续自然数的乘积是 210，求这三个数的和。

solutions.label: 质因数分解法
steps: 三个连续自然数，尝试组合这些质因数。
验证：5、6、7 确实是三个连续自然数。

scenes.svg:
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 400 200' width='400' height='200'>
  <text x='200' y='30' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>210 的质因数分解树</text>
  
  <!-- 树根 -->
  <text x='200' y='60' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='18' fill='#e74c3c' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>210</text>
  
  <!-- 第一层分支 -->
  <line x1='200' y1='70' x2='140' y2='100' stroke='#666' stroke-width='1.5'/>
  <line x1='200' y1='70' x2='260' y2='100' stroke='#666' stroke-width='1.5'/>
  
  <text x='130' y='115' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#3498db' text-anchor='middle'>10</text>
  <text x='270' y='115' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#3498db' text-anchor='middle'>21</text>
  
  <!-- 第二层分支 -->
  <line x1='130' y1='125' x2='100' y2='150' stroke='#666' stroke-width='1.5'/>
  <line x1='130' y1='125' x2='160' y2='150' stroke='#666' stroke-width='1.5'/>
  <line x1='270' y1='125' x2='240' y2='150' stroke='#666' stroke-width='1.5'/>
  <line x1='270' y1='125' x2='300' y2='150' stroke='#666' stroke-width='1.5'/>
  
  <text x='90' y='165' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#27ae60' text-anchor='middle'>2</text>
  <text x='170' y='165' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#27ae60' text-anchor='middle'>5</text>
  <text x='230' y='165' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#27ae60' text-anchor='middle'>3</text>
  <text x='310' y='165' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#27ae60' text-anchor='middle'>7</text>
  
  <text x='200' y='195' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#666' text-anchor='middle'>210 = 2 × 3 × 5 × 7</text>
</svg>
scenes.caption: 步骤1：将 210 分解质因数，得到 2 × 3 × 5 × 7
三个连续自然数为 5、6、7，和为 18

variant.question: 两个质数的和是 30，求这两个质数的乘积。
